scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build -w shared
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.guide:embed-telegram: npx marked -o .tmp-telegram.html -i docs/TELEGRAM_BOT_GUIDE.md --gfm && npx marked -o .tmp-telegram-he.html -i client/public/guides/TELEGRAM_BOT_GUIDE.he.md --gfm && node scripts/inline-telegram-guide-into-guide.mjs
